headline: The firm's prior conclusions on capex cycles align with the announcement, implying durable demand for compute.
body_markdown: The firm's prior conclusion suggests AI compute demand drives chip capex through multi-year cycles. Existing Noosphere claims indicate founders believe AI adoption accelerates compounding returns. These align with today's announcement.

citations.quoted_span: AI compute demand drives chip capex
Founders believe AI adoption accelerates compounding returns.
